assertions.description: Profiler is exposed on the main thread window object.
Profiler is a constructor function on the main thread.
A main-thread Profiler can be constructed under the page Document-Policy and stop() resolves to the JS Self-Profiling trace shape.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(typeof Profiler!=='function')return false;const profiler=new Profiler({sampleInterval:10,maxBufferSize:50});if(profiler.sampleInterval!==10||profiler.stopped!==false||typeof profiler.stop!=='function')return false;await new Promise(resolve=>setTimeout(resolve,25));let work=0;for(let i=0;i<50000;i++){work+=Math.sqrt(i);}const trace=await profiler.stop();return profiler.stopped===true&&Array.isArray(trace.frames)&&Array.isArray(trace.resources)&&Array.isArray(trace.samples)&&Array.isArray(trace.stacks);})()

assertions.description: A Blob Dedicated Worker checks the worker global scope for the Profiler constructor added by the feature.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(typeof Worker!=='function')return false;const blob=new Blob(["self.postMessage(typeof Profiler==='function')"],{type:"application/javascript"});const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);return await new Promise(resolve=>{let settled=false;let worker;const timer=setTimeout(()=>done(false),2000);const done=value=>{if(settled)return;settled=true;clearTimeout(timer);try{worker&&worker.terminate();}catch{}URL.revokeObjectURL(url);resolve(value);};try{worker=new Worker(url);worker.onmessage=event=>done(event.data===true);worker.onerror=()=>done(false);}catch{done(false);}});})()

assertions.description: The demo and conformance routes are served with a Document-Policy header that enables JS self-profiling.
The Profiler constructor rejects an invalid negative sampleInterval value.
